name: Cumberland Pudding (with Lemon Sauce) - Cbd
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Self-raising flour -OR- plain flour sifted with one tsp baking powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the cooking apples.
2. In a large bowl, mix the currants, sugar, suet, flour (or plain flour with baking powder), breadcrumbs, lemon rind, and chopped crystallized peel.
3. Add the eggs to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Shape the mixture into a pudding shape.
5. Place the pudding in a deep pot or baking dish.
6. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour, covered.
8. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving with lemon sauce.
